results.title: About | PawPal
results.h1: Enhancing the Bond Between You & Your Pet
headings: Enhancing the Bond Between You & Your Pet
App, Web, and NFC tags working as one loop.
firstViewportText: Enhancing the Bond Between You & Your Pet

PawPal is a location-based pet life platform for young pet owners in Europe. Starting from the high-frequency scenario of dog walking, we combine gamified maps, reward systems, NFC safety tags, AI assistance, and local community — helping owners care for their pets more intelligently, securely, and connectedly.

results.title: Help Center | PawPal
results.h1: Help that keeps pet safety moving.
headings: Help that keeps pet safety moving.
firstViewportText: Help that keeps pet safety moving.
Quick guidance for NFC safety tags, finder pages, account access, community activity, and PawPal support routes.

results.title: Privacy Policy | PawPal
results.h1: Controlled sharing for every pet safety flow.
headings: Controlled sharing for every pet safety flow.
firstViewportText: Controlled sharing for every pet safety flow.
PawPal is designed around controlled sharing: owners decide what is public, what stays private, and when lost-mode information should be visible.
Owner contact stays hidden until needed.
Support routes are ready for GDPR requests.

results.title: Terms of Service | PawPal
results.h1: Clear rules for pet care, commerce, and community.
headings: Clear rules for pet care, commerce, and community.
firstViewportText: Clear rules for pet care, commerce, and community.
These terms summarize the expected use of PawPal across the website, store, app, and public pet safety flows.
Urgent rescue situations should use local services first.
Checkout, pricing, and shipping are confirmed before payment.
Profiles, maps, and posts should help owners and finders.

results.title: About | PawPal
results.h1: Enhancing the Bond Between You & Your Pet
headings: Enhancing the Bond Between You & Your Pet
App, Web, and NFC tags working as one loop.
firstViewportText: Enhancing the Bond Between You & Your Pet

PawPal is a location-based pet life platform for young pet owners in Europe. Starting from the high-frequency scenario of dog walking, we combine gamified maps, reward systems, NFC safety tags, AI assistance, and local community — helping owners care for their pets more intelligently, securely, and connectedly.
App, Web, and NFC tags working as one loop.
Walks, pets, reminders, and AI guidance.
Smart tags open controlled finder pages.
Map places, community help, and support routes.
“PawPal's mission is not to replace companionship with technology, but to enhance the bond between humans and their pets through smart tools.”
